btnActionsign: Sign in and start learning today!
pFeatures: This web app allows you to select grammar rules, generate targeted exercises, and record short audio samples to receive pronunciation feedback. Please note: the website is currently under development and testing, and only selected features are available at this stage.
pAudioFeedback: Users can record a short spoken statement. The system analyzes pronunciation. Users receive feedback to help improve their speaking skills.
pSpellingFeedback: Users can write and submit a short text. The system checks for spelling mistakes. Feedback is provided to help users correct errors.
pGrammarPractice: Users can select a grammar topic. The system generates an A1-level gap-fill quiz. Users receive feedback on their answers to support learning.
pContact: My name is Isabelle Bidou. I am a Fullstack developer and an English teacher based in Paris. I offer a coaching service for professionals who need to speak English with specific constraints related to their activities.  I also prepare students for the engineering schools oral entrance test exams. If you have questions, feel free to contact me
pCookie: This website uses cookies for authentication with google OAuth, to enhance the user experience. If you consent tousing cookies. In order to try the features you must authenticate with your google credentials.
H2OffersIntro: My services are designed to adapt to your needs, offering personalised 1:1 coaching (online or in-person) as well as corporate workshops delivered online or onsite in your workplace.
h2OffersLegend: Professional English Coaching Offers for Adults
h2OffersLegendPrepa: Prépa & Khôlle Training Offers for Students
tdIndividualPilot: €405 total (6 weeks – 1 session/week – 90 min – fully personalised coaching)
tdIndividualMonthly: €260 / month (4 sessions – 90 min each – ongoing personalised coaching)
pIndividualOffers: I offer personalised 1:1 English coaching designed to meet your specific professional needs. With a strong background in corporate environments, software development, and customer service, I help you gain confidence, fluency, and accuracy in real-world situations such as Scrum meetings, business presentations, interviews, and client interactions. Sessions are highly interactive and tailored to your goals, combining practical communication practice, roleplay scenarios, targeted grammar reinforcement, and personalised correction to help you express yourself clearly and naturally in professional contexts.
pIndividualTermsSummary: Single sessions and pilot programmes are payable in advance. Monthly programmes are invoiced at the beginning of each month and payable in advance. Sessions cancelled more than 48 hours in advance may be rescheduled. Sessions cancelled less than 48 hours in advance are charged in full.
pIndividualOfferNote: Coaching sessions are fully customized to professional communication needs (meetings, technical discussions, presentations, workplace interaction).
pOfferBook: Book your free 10-minute consultation to discuss your specific needs and goals with me. This is necessary before you commit to in-person sessions. This is a great opportunity for me to get acquainted with the specifics of your professional context. Simply follow this link to choose a time that suits you:
pCorporateOffer: I offer tailored English communication workshops designed for teams working in international and operational environments. With experience in corporate settings, technical fields, and professional communication coaching, I help employees develop confidence and clarity in real-world situations such as meetings, cross-team collaboration, technical discussions, and client interactions. Workshops combine practical communication, roleplay scenarios, targeted grammar reinforcement, and specialised professional vocabulary to ensure accurate, natural, and immediately applicable English in the workplace.
tdCorporatePilot: €990 total (6 weeks – 1 session/week – 90 min – small group onsite)
tdCorporateMonthly: €700 / month (4 weekly workshops – 90 min – onsite – 4–6 participants)
pCorporateOfferNote: All workshops are fully customized to professional communication needs (meetings, technical discussions, presentations, workplace interaction).
pCorporateTermsSummary: Single sessions and pilot programmes are payable in advance. Monthly programmes are invoiced at the beginning of each month and payable in advance.
individualSingleDesc: A one-off coaching session focused on a specific professional communication need.
corporateSingleDesc: A standalone workshop designed to address a specific communication challenge or training objective.
individualPilotDesc: An effective entry point to assess your needs, define objectives, and experience the coaching approach before committing to a longer-term programme, while consolidating essential grammatical foundations to support greater precision, clarity, and confidence in professional communication.
individualMonthlyDesc: Ongoing coaching designed to build confidence, fluency, and accuracy through regular practice and personalised support.
corporatePilotDesc: A practical introduction to workplace English workshops, allowing teams and managers to evaluate the programme's impact.
corporateMonthlyDesc: A structured long-term training programme designed to improve communication skills, confidence, and professional English usage across the team.
divLoginToAccessPayment: Log in to enable payment access. Before proceeding with payment make sure we have availabilities.
